---
title: "Mixed Types Exam"
---

# Statistics Mixed Types Exam

Show your work where applicable.

## Question 1 [10 pts]

What is the median of {1, 3, 5, 7, 9}?

a) 3
b) 5 [x]
c) 7
d) 9

## Question 2 [5 pts]

The normal distribution is symmetric.

a) True [x]
b) False

## Question 3 [20 pts]

Discuss the assumptions of linear regression and explain why each is important.

## Question 4 [10 pts]

Calculate the standard deviation of the dataset {4, 8, 6, 5, 3}.

**Answer:** 1.87

## Question 5 [15 pts]

Match the following statistical tests with their appropriate use cases:

- t-test :: Comparing two group means
- ANOVA :: Comparing three or more group means
- Chi-square :: Testing association between categorical variables
- Correlation :: Measuring linear relationship between two variables

## Question 6 [10 pts]

The [blank1] is a measure of spread, while the [blank2] is a measure of central tendency.

[blank1]: standard deviation, variance
[blank2]: mean, median, mode
